ocr.text: The live commerce segment within Pinduoduo has exhibited significant performance metrics, reflective of the evolving e-
commerce landscape in the Asia-Pacific region. In the third quarter of 2023, the company reported a TotalRevenue of
"Q32023," underscoring a strategic focus on enhancing digital shopping experiences. This quarter also saw a noteworthy
ConversionRate of "25.0%," which highlights the effectiveness of live commerce in driving customer purchases.
Additionally, the GrossMargin for this period reached "₹300M," indicating robust profitability in live commerce activities. The
interplay between revenue generation and customer engagement is further demonstrated by the CustomerEngagement's
TotalRevenue contribution, which is denoted as "CustomerEngagement." Notably, the NetIncome for Q32023 was "₹1,200,"
reflecting a concerted effort to balance growth and profitability. As the market evolves, the GrowthRate metrics signal ongoing
opportunities; specifically, the TotalRevenue's growth is indicated by "GrowthRate," while the NetIncome's trajectory is
captured as "RevenueGrowth." To sustain this momentum, understanding the ConversionChange alongside customer
engagement strategies will be paramount in navigating the competitive landscape of live commerce. As such, these metrics not
only illustrate current performance but also provide a foundation for strategic decision-making aimed at maximizing revenue
